$comment: Per-store white-label build config. Copy this file to stores/<slug>.json and fill in the real values. The factory (scripts/build_store.sh <slug>) reads it and stamps a branded binary. Slug = the file name without .json; use kebab-case (e.g. dear-wish).
$comment_slug: Human/CI identifier for this store build. Must match the file name. kebab-case.
$comment_appName: REQUIRED. The app's display name — shown under the launcher icon (Android label) and on the iOS home screen (CFBundleDisplayName). This is the merchant's brand name.
$comment_androidApplicationId: REQUIRED. The Android applicationId (Play Store package name). Must be globally unique, reverse-DNS, lowercase, no dashes. Convention: ai.mautomate.shopper.<storeslug-no-dashes>. NEVER change it once the app is published — Play treats a changed id as a different app.
$comment_iosBundleId: REQUIRED for iOS. The iOS bundle identifier (App Store). Reverse-DNS, no dashes/underscores. Usually identical to androidApplicationId. NEVER change once published.
$comment_accentColor: OPTIONAL. Hex color used ONLY for the first-paint splash/brand background before the live design payload loads. Runtime theme colors come from the store's CMS design payload, so this is a cosmetic default. Defaults to the mAutomate ember if omitted.
$comment_iconPath: OPTIONAL but strongly recommended. Path (relative to apps/shopper-app) to the store's launcher icon: a square PNG, 1024x1024, no transparency for iOS. If omitted, the default mAutomate icon is used. The merchant provides this asset.

dartDefines.$comment_API_BASE_URL: REQUIRED. Backend origin serving the Medusa store API (/store/products, /store/carts, /store/cms/...). Production is https://api.mautomate.ai; the same pooled backend serves every store.
dartDefines.$comment_STORE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY: REQUIRED. The store's Medusa publishable API key (pk_...). This single value scopes BOTH CMS tenancy and the catalog sales channel to this one store. It is the primary per-store binding. Get it from tenant.publishable_key.
dartDefines.$comment_TENANT_ID: OPTIONAL/informational. Owning tenant id, sent as x-tenant-id. The backend derives tenant from the publishable key, so this is a fallback/telemetry aid.
dartDefines.$comment_CMS_BASE: REQUIRED. Origin used to resolve root-relative CMS asset URLs (e.g. /learts/assets/images/...). Set to the store's public storefront domain so images load from the right host. Falls back to API_BASE_URL in the app if empty.

$comment_notes: region_id / currency are NOT baked in — the app fetches them live from GET /tenant-config using the publishable key. Colors are runtime-dynamic from the CMS design payload. Only appName, icon, applicationId/bundleId, and the dartDefines above are baked at build time.
